name: Forgotten Realms Calendar (Harptos)
description: The Calendar of Harptos used in the Forgotten Realms setting. Includes 12 months of 30 days, 5 annual holidays, and the Shieldmeet leap day.

calendar_presets.name: Calendar of Harptos
calendar_presets.description: The standard Faerûnian calendar with 12 months, 5 holidays, and Shieldmeet.
